summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 3D avatar scene with Three.js integration. All core features functional including avatar canvas, environment/character selectors, GLB upload, emotion controls, and service health widget.

minor_api_notices.issue: Console shows AxiosError messages when changing avatar environment/character
minor_api_notices.impact: Non-blocking - avatar functionality works correctly despite console errors

service_integration.issue: Service health shows 'Unable to load service status' initially
service_integration.impact: Expected behavior due to mocked APIs in container environment
service_integration.status: Working as expected for mocked environment

passed_tests: Avatar canvas renders with proper Three.js context
Environment selector works (Minimal Sci-Fi, Cozy Library, Futuristic Lab)
Character selector works (Lillith Core, Archivist, Sentinel)
GLB/GLTF upload input accepts files without crashing
All avatar emotion buttons functional (idle, happy, curious, concerned)
Service health widget loads and refresh button works
Chat functionality works with message sending
Navigation between all pages works (Dashboard, Character Builder, Projects, Services)
Responsive design works on desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
Three.js avatar animations and environment changes work properly
File upload simulation successful with helper text updates
